ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "calendar_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "sell_category" INTEGER /* Category of the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sell_category FOREIGN KEY ("sell_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sell_id FOREIGN KEY ("sell_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "sell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sell_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for sales made through this channel */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sales transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sales occurred */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, inventory manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
